zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡，下行压力仍存
zh.content:
当前价格位于1.07188，低于SMA20均线1.082392，说明短线仍处于弱势整理格局。近二十四小时跌幅虽仅0.36%，但价格贴近当日低点收盘，显示空方仍占据主动，若缺乏放量反弹，趋势仍偏谨慎。

从技术指标观察，MACD为负值，反映市场动能依旧偏空，短期尚未出现明显的趋势反转信号。由于RSI数据暂缺，难以进一步确认是否进入超卖区域，因此需要结合后续成交量及K线形态综合判断。

支撑方面，可重点关注1.07000附近，一旦有效跌破，或进一步测试1.06000区域；上方首要阻力位于1.08200至1.08500附近，若能够重新站稳SMA20，则有望改善短线结构，并向更高压力区发起挑战。

交易策略建议以顺势操作为主，激进投资者可等待价格放量突破阻力后跟进，稳健者则宜观察支撑企稳及MACD改善信号再考虑布局。同时严格设置止损，控制仓位，避免震荡行情带来的反复风险。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
continues to trade under mild bearish pressure, with price holding at 1.07188 after a 0.36% daily decline. The broader structure shows a failure to sustain recovery attempts above the 20-period SMA at 1.082392, reinforcing a short-term corrective phase. Price action is compressed near intraday lows, suggesting sellers remain in control while buyers have yet to generate meaningful momentum for a rebound.

Momentum signals lean weak, with MACD registering -0.010740430, confirming negative directional bias. Although RSI is unavailable, price behavior below the SMA20 implies subdued strength and limited bullish follow-through. The absence of upward acceleration suggests consolidation within a downward-tilted range rather than a reversal. Until momentum indicators stabilize or turn positive, rallies are likely to face fading interest near resistance zones.

Key support is forming at 1.07188, aligned with the current session low, followed by psychological support around 1.0700 and deeper structural demand near 1.0650. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at 1.07999, with stronger barriers at the SMA20 level of 1.082392. A break and hold above this moving average would be required to shift bias back toward a neutral or recovery-oriented structure.

From a trading perspective, the setup favors cautious short positioning below 1.0800, with protective stops above 1.0830–1.0850 to manage breakout risk. Short-term traders may also consider mean-reversion scalps near 1.0700, but confirmation is key. A sustained move above the SMA20 would invalidate bearish momentum and open the path toward 1.0900, signaling a potential trend reset.
